text:
# Hyperliquid Spot V1 is live in Infinex Perps

For a while, spot trading in Infinex meant swaps — routed through Curve Finance or Jupiter, both AMM-based. Useful, but not an order book. Today that changes.

Hyperliquid Spot V1 is Infinex's first CLOB spot order book. CLOB stands for Central Limit Order Book — the same structure that powers every major exchange. Every order you place, every cancel, every trade executes onchain, on HyperCore, Hyperliquid's L1, with one-block finality via HyperBFT consensus. There is no bridge. There is no wrapper. The order book is the chain.

What's live today:

- **24 spot markets**, all USDC-quoted, with more than $100K in daily volume each
- Market, limit, and post-only orders; modify and cancel by order ID
- Real-time order book rendered live in the Infinex UI
- Account spot balances and trade history visible in the same unified account you use for perps

The volume is real. HYPE/USDC leads at $284M in 24-hour volume. UBTC/USDC follows at $61M. UETH/USDC at $20M. USOL/USDC at $9M. PURR/USDC — the default market in the app, and the one we use for testing — at $8M.

Access requires a unified account; if you've been trading perps in Infinex, you already qualify. Switch to spot inside the app, pick a market, and you're looking at a live order book.

Start at perps.app.infinex.xyz — navigate to any spot market via /hyperliquid/spot/{BASE}/USDC, or open PURR/USDC directly at /hyperliquid/spot/PURR/USDC.
deployed_facts_used: This is Infinex's first CLOB spot order book integration: True — the roadmap doc states 'Spot trading is in development' as of Feb 2026, and Spot V1 on this branch is the first spot product mode in the perps app. Previous Infinex products (Perps) are perp futures; prior swaps were DEX/AMM-based (Curve Finance, Jupiter), not a CLOB spot order book.
Spot order type — Hyperliquid order book type: Fully onchain CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) — every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation happens transparently onchain with one-block finality

Hyperliquid's order books — what they are technically: Fully onchain perpetual futures AND spot order books on HyperCore (Hyperliquid's L1); every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation is transparent with one-block finality via HyperBFT consensus; 200k orders/second throughput
Number of Hyperliquid spot markets with >$100K 24h volume (defensible tradeable count): 24
Quote currency for Spot V1 in Infinex Perps: USDC (USDC-only; non-USDC pairs excluded from execution)
Spot V1 supported order types: Market, limit, and post-only orders; cancel by oid/cloid; modify/batch modify.

Spot V1 — what user can see and do: Users can view USDC-quoted spot market catalog, real-time order book, market data/charts, account spot balances and history, and place/cancel/modify market and limit spot orders
Account type required to access Hyperliquid Spot V1: Unified account (unifiedAccount) only
Top Hyperliquid spot market by 24h volume: HYPE/USDC — $284M 24h volume

Notable spot markets available with >$1M 24h volume: HYPE/USDC ($284M), UBTC/USDC ($61M), UETH/USDC ($20M), UZEC/USDC ($14M), USOL/USDC ($9M), KNTQ/USDC ($8M), PURR/USDC ($8M), USDH/USDC ($4.5M), USDT0/USDC ($4.4M), XMR1/USDC ($4.3M), UPUMP/USDC ($1.5M), UFART/USDC ($0.9M)
Default spot market (used in routes and E2E tests): PURR/USDC
Spot market route URL pattern within Infinex Perps app: https://perps.app.infinex.xyz/hyperliquid/spot/{BASE}/{QUOTE}
Infinex Perps app URL: https://perps.app.infinex.xyz
Perps trading venue provider: Hyperliquid

not_said.fact: Feature branch name for Hyperliquid Spot V1 integration: spot-integration
not_said.reason: Internal branch name is an implementation detail with no user-facing meaning.

not_said.fact: Spot V1 — perps-only controls not available in spot UI: Leverage, margin mode, liquidation, funding, reduce-only, close, reverse, TP/SL are not applicable in Spot V1
not_said.reason: A list of absent perps controls is a support-doc entry, not a blog paragraph — it distracts from what the product is and implies the reader expected those controls in spot.

not_said.fact: UI product-mode switching — how users move between perps and spot: Users click 'Switch to Spot' or 'Switch to Perps' button in the app; last-visited symbol per mode is preserved (subject to known minor bug in localStorage persistence)
not_said.reason: The localStorage bug must not appear in any public-facing copy.

text:
# Hyperliquid Spot V1 is live in Infinex Perps

This is the first CLOB spot order book we have shipped. Every prior Infinex spot-adjacent product — swaps on Curve Finance, swaps on Jupiter — ran through AMMs. This is different: a fully onchain Central Limit Order Book, every order and cancel and trade transparent on HyperCore, Hyperliquid's L1, with one-block finality via HyperBFT consensus.

The floor is already occupied. Twenty-four markets are live with more than $100K in 24-hour volume. HYPE/USDC is leading at $284M in the last 24 hours. Also live: UBTC/USDC at $61M, UETH/USDC at $20M, USOL/USDC at $9M, PURR/USDC at $8M, and more across the full catalog.

What you can do today: view the full USDC-quoted spot market catalog, watch the live order book, read charts and market data, check your spot balances and history, and place, cancel, or modify market and limit orders.

Access requires a unified account. Switch between spot and perps with the mode button in the app — your last-visited symbol in each mode is preserved.

Perps trading is unaffected. Leverage, margin mode, funding, and perps-specific controls remain exactly where they were.

Trade at perps.app.infinex.xyz
deployed_facts_used: This is Infinex's first CLOB spot order book integration: True — the roadmap doc states 'Spot trading is in development' as of Feb 2026, and Spot V1 on this branch is the first spot product mode in the perps app. Previous Infinex products (Perps) are perp futures; prior swaps were DEX/AMM-based (Curve Finance, Jupiter), not a CLOB spot order book.
Spot order type — Hyperliquid order book type: Fully onchain CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) — every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation happens transparently onchain with one-block finality

Hyperliquid's order books — what they are technically: Fully onchain perpetual futures AND spot order books on HyperCore (Hyperliquid's L1); every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation is transparent with one-block finality via HyperBFT consensus; 200k orders/second throughput
Number of Hyperliquid spot markets with >$100K 24h volume (defensible tradeable count): 24
Top Hyperliquid spot market by 24h volume: HYPE/USDC — $284M 24h volume

Notable spot markets available with >$1M 24h volume: HYPE/USDC ($284M), UBTC/USDC ($61M), UETH/USDC ($20M), UZEC/USDC ($14M), USOL/USDC ($9M), KNTQ/USDC ($8M), PURR/USDC ($8M), USDH/USDC ($4.5M), USDT0/USDC ($4.4M), XMR1/USDC ($4.3M), UPUMP/USDC ($1.5M), UFART/USDC ($0.9M)

Spot V1 — what user can see and do: Users can view USDC-quoted spot market catalog, real-time order book, market data/charts, account spot balances and history, and place/cancel/modify market and limit spot orders
Account type required to access Hyperliquid Spot V1: Unified account (unifiedAccount) only — non-unified account modes (disabled, dexAbstraction, portfolioMargin) are blocked from spot trading

UI product-mode switching — how users move between perps and spot: Users click 'Switch to Spot' or 'Switch to Perps' button in the app; last-visited symbol per mode is preserved (subject to known minor bug in localStorage persistence)
Infinex Perps app URL: https://perps.app.infinex.xyz
Official name of the Infinex trading app: Infinex Perps

not_said.reason: The absence of trigger/TWAP/scale is not the point of this launch; listing what is missing foregrounds limitation over capability

text:
1. Spot trading is live
Hyperliquid Spot V1 is now in Infinex Perps — our first CLOB spot order book. Not a swap. Not an AMM. A real order book, onchain, in the same app and unified account you already use.

2. 24 live markets
24 USDC-quoted spot markets with real volume. HYPE/USDC leads at $284M daily. UBTC/USDC at $61M. UETH/USDC at $20M. USOL/USDC at $9M. PURR/USDC at $8M. All accessible today.

3. Fully onchain — what that means
Every order, cancel, and trade executes on HyperCore — Hyperliquid's L1 — with one-block finality. No bridge. No wrapper. The order book is the chain, and it's visible in the Infinex UI in real time.

4. Start trading
Open perps.app.infinex.xyz and switch to spot. PURR/USDC is the default market. Market and limit orders supported. Your unified account is already set up — no new signup required.

text:
1. Hyperliquid Spot V1 is live
For the first time in Infinex, you are trading on a fully onchain CLOB — a Central Limit Order Book, not a swap or AMM. Every order, cancel, and trade is transparent on HyperCore with one-block finality.

2. 24 markets. Real volume.
Twenty-four markets with over $100K in 24-hour volume. HYPE/USDC leads at $284M daily. UBTC/USDC at $61M. UETH/USDC at $20M. USOL/USDC at $9M. The floor is already occupied.

View the live order book, browse USDC-quoted markets, read charts, check spot balances, and place or modify market and limit orders. Requires a unified account.

4. Trade at perps.app.infinex.xyz
Switch between spot and perps inside the app. Your last-visited symbol in each mode is preserved. The door is open.

text:
Hyperliquid Spot is live in Infinex Perps — our first CLOB spot order book.

Fully onchain. 24 markets. HYPE/USDC leading at $284M daily volume.

Same unified account as your perps. perps.app.infinex.xyz
deployed_facts_used: Spot trading venue provider for Infinex Perps app: Hyperliquid
Official name of the Infinex trading app: Infinex Perps
This is Infinex's first CLOB spot order book integration: True
Spot order type — Hyperliquid order book type: Fully onchain CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) — every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation happens transparently onchain with one-block finality
Number of Hyperliquid spot markets with >$100K 24h volume (defensible tradeable count): 24
Top Hyperliquid spot market by 24h volume: HYPE/USDC — $284M 24h volume
Account type required to access Hyperliquid Spot V1: Unified account (unifiedAccount) only
Infinex Perps app URL: https://perps.app.infinex.xyz

not_said.fact: Spot V1 supported order types: Market, limit, and post-only orders; cancel by oid/cloid; modify/batch modify. Trigger, TWAP, and scale orders are NOT supported in Spot V1.
not_said.reason: Order type mechanics belong in blog and carousel; X is for category and orientation, not a feature checklist.

not_said.fact: Default spot market (used in routes and E2E tests): PURR/USDC
not_said.reason: PURR/USDC is the default test market, not the volume leader; leading with HYPE/USDC is more credibility-bearing for X.

not_said.fact: Hyperliquid's order books — what they are technically: Fully onchain perpetual futures AND spot order books on HyperCore (Hyperliquid's L1); every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation is transparent with one-block finality via HyperBFT consensus; 200k orders/second throughput
not_said.reason: 200k orders/sec throughput is infrastructure depth appropriate for blog/carousel, not a one-tweet claim.

text:
Hyperliquid Spot is live in Infinex Perps.

This is our first CLOB spot order book — not a swap, not an AMM. A real order book, fully onchain on HyperCore, with one-block finality.

Same app. Same unified account. New market structure. 🧵

24 spot markets live, all USDC-quoted.

HYPE/USDC: $284M daily volume. UBTC/USDC: $61M. UETH/USDC: $20M. USOL/USDC: $9M. PURR/USDC: $8M.

Every order, cancel, and trade is onchain — not a bridge, not a wrapper. HyperCore handles it.

Start at perps.app.infinex.xyz → open the spot tab → PURR/USDC is the default market.

Market and limit orders supported. Your perps account already qualifies.

deployed_facts_used: This is Infinex's first CLOB spot order book integration: True
Spot order type — Hyperliquid order book type: Fully onchain CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) — every order, cancel, trade, and liquidation happens transparently onchain with one-block finality
Account type required to access Hyperliquid Spot V1: Unified account (unifiedAccount) only
Number of Hyperliquid spot markets with >$100K 24h volume (defensible tradeable count): 24
Quote currency for Spot V1 in Infinex Perps: USDC (USDC-only; non-USDC pairs excluded from execution)
Top Hyperliquid spot market by 24h volume: HYPE/USDC — $284M 24h volume

Notable spot markets available with >$1M 24h volume: HYPE/USDC ($284M), UBTC/USDC ($61M), UETH/USDC ($20M), UZEC/USDC ($14M), USOL/USDC ($9M), KNTQ/USDC ($8M), PURR/USDC ($8M), USDH/USDC ($4.5M), USDT0/USDC ($4.4M), XMR1/USDC ($4.3M), UPUMP/USDC ($1.5M), UFART/USDC ($0.9M)
Hyperliquid's order books — what they are technically: Fully onchain perpetual futures AND spot order books on HyperCore (Hyperliquid's L1)
Default spot market (used in routes and E2E tests): PURR/USDC
Infinex Perps app URL: https://perps.app.infinex.xyz
Spot V1 supported order types: Market, limit, and post-only orders

not_said.fact: Spot V1 — perps-only controls not available in spot UI: Leverage, margin mode, liquidation, funding, reduce-only, close, reverse, TP/SL are not applicable in Spot V1
not_said.reason: Listing what is absent is a support-doc register, not a launch thread register. What's not there does not anchor the reader.

not_said.fact: UI product-mode switching — how users move between perps and spot: Users click 'Switch to Spot' or 'Switch to Perps' button in the app; last-visited symbol per mode is preserved (subject to known minor bug in localStorage persistence)
not_said.reason: The localStorage bug is an internal implementation note; surfacing it publicly is off-character and risks undercutting the launch.

not_said.fact: Hyperliquid Twitter / X handle: @HyperliquidX
not_said.reason: No @ mention in the thread body was required by the brief; tagging is a social decision above copy level.

text:
Hyperliquid Spot V1 is live in Infinex Perps.

This is the first CLOB spot order book we have shipped. Previous Infinex spot products were AMM-based swaps. This is an onchain limit order book — every order transparent, one-block finality on HyperCore.

The floor is already occupied.

24 markets live with >$100K 24h volume. HYPE/USDC at $284M. UBTC/USDC at $61M. UETH/USDC at $20M. USOL/USDC at $9M. PURR/USDC at $8M.

All USDC-quoted. Requires a unified account.

Place and modify market or limit orders on the Hyperliquid spot order book, inside Infinex Perps.

perps.app.infinex.xyz
